SEARCH
Module com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.user.impl
Package com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.ministry.impl

Class ViewRiksdagenGovermentProposals

java.lang.Object
com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.ministry.impl.ViewRiksdagenGovermentProposals
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.hack23.cia.model.common.api.ModelObject, java.io.Serializable
@Entity(name="ViewRiksdagenGovermentProposals") public class ViewRiksdagenGovermentProposals extends java.lang.Object implements com.hack23.cia.model.common.api.ModelObject
The Class ViewRiksdagenGovermentProposals. JPA Entity for view_riksdagen_goverment_proposals database view. Provides access to government propositions (proposals) enabling analysis of government legislative initiatives and policy proposals.
See Also:
